options.derived_hashes_desc: Add missing texture state hashes (e.g. LOD Bias High/Medium, Cantarella wet, Chisa Enhanced E, Aemeath Charged) so character mod textures display correctly (some characters not added)
options.stable_texture_desc: Use RabbitFX to set stable textures for characters (currently Cantarella, Chisa, Cartethyia, Ciaccona...). Requires latest RabbitFX
options.aemeath_mech: Fix Aemeath's mech form model error
options.aemeath_mech_desc: Do not enable this option for Aemeath mech mods that are already normal, do not repeat the fix
options.aero_eye: Fix Aero Rover Eye abnormal mapping
options.aero_eye_warn: [!] Make sure your mod has this bug, otherwise do NOT enable!
options.aero_eye_tip: If one mode doesn't work, rollback first then try the other mode.

console.refresh_desc: Fetch latest fix configuration from remote
console.cancelling: Safely aborting active tasks, please wait...

update.mandatory: Update required. Minimum config version needed:

rollback.title: Backups & Rollback
rollback.warn_delete_all: Restore to initial state & delete {n} backups?
rollback.warn_restore: Revert mod files to this state?
rollback.restore_all_desc: Reverts all files to the oldest recorded state and removes all intermediate backups.
rollback.clean_backups_desc: Permanently removes all .BAK files from the target folder. This cannot be undone.
